page: Microsoft Azure E8s_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz. It features 8 vCPUs across 4 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It lacks local storage and dedicated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark results indicate strong single-threaded performance, with a Geekbench single-core score of 2164.0 and single-threaded gzip compression reaching 31.4 GB/sec. Multi-core performance is average, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 8345.0 and a stress-ng multi-core CPU score of 7990.43. Memory bandwidth is measured at 621.63 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 67.48 GB/sec for uncached large blocks.

The lack of local storage represents a key architectural tradeoff, requiring reliance on external storage solutions. While the system handles small-model LLM inference adequately, it exhibits weak performance on larger models, such as 8.03 tokens/sec for medium model text generation. This server is suited for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and text processing tasks that benefit from its 64.0 GB memory capacity and strong single-core execution.
description: Microsoft Azure E8s_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine configured with 8 vCPUs and 64.0 GB of RAM, delivering a memory-optimized 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. Powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8573C processor operating at 4.2 GHz, this Hyper-V hosted instance features 4 physical cores and a 260 MB L3 cache. It lacks local storage and GPUs but supports Premium Storage. Benchmarks show strong single-core performance, with a Geekbench single-core score of 2164.0 and single-threaded gzip compression of 31.4 GB/sec, alongside average multi-core and memory bandwidth results. However, LLM inference for larger models is a notable bottleneck, with text generation on a medium model dropping to 8.03 tokens/sec. This instance is suited for database operations, memory-intensive applications, and text processing workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E8s_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 8 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon processor, designed for database and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E8s_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized VM with 8 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon CPU, lacking local storage.
tagline: An x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring a dedicated 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon processor and a high memory-to-core ratio.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz
64.0 GB of RAM providing an 8.0 GB per vCPU ratio
Strong single-core performance in compression and text processing
No local storage, requiring external Premium Storage attachment
Suited for database operations and memory-intensive workloads
